_comment: Win-rate acceptance band for scripts/selfplay.mjs --check. Content changes must keep the simulated win rate inside [min,max] and strictly beatable (>0) and survivable (<1). Regenerate the observed numbers with: node scripts/selfplay.mjs --runs 6000 --check. The exhaustive per-content history lives in scripts/content-backlog.json (one detailed entry per shipped module); this file keeps only the current snapshot plus the balance method.

observed.note: ELITE-MODS-BATCH (2026-07-16, LADDER 2 #15): added 6 depth-themed ELITE MODIFIERS to lj.enemy.mods (js/enemy.js), pool 8 -> 14 — Glacial (frost tank hp x1.5/agi x0.6), Adamantine (bulwark hp x1.3/def x1.5/str x0.7), Plagueridden (blight glass-cannon str x1.4/crit x1.5/hp x0.65), Volcanic (ember frenzy agi x1.5/crit x1.4/hp x0.7/armor x0.5), Colossal (bruiser hp x1.6/str x1.25/agi x0.5), Skittering (swarm agi x1.6/hp x0.5/armor x0). Each is a 7-stat MULTIPLIER array rolled 1-in-5 by lj.enemy.get onto EVERY enemy incl apex bosses (name prepends; the boss's .mechanic survives because base copies type.mechanic, not the mod's). Only wiring is mod.push. ZERO symbol-crash risk (a mod prepends a name + scales stats; the enemy still renders by its grade tile, so scene.js/hero.js render maps are untouched — browser-verified). RULES: armor mult <= 1 on every entry (%-mitigation compounds at depth); mods multiply the realm-scaled stats; each a genuine risk/reward TRADE (upside paid in downside), mirroring the legacy pool. DESIGN: 3 family/depth themes pair a survivability buff with an offense cut; 3 glass-cannons/jokers pair offense with fragility — balanced spread, not 6 buffs. KEY FINDING — the feared worst case (offensive mod on an ENRAGED apex) is a NON-ISSUE: an offensive mod that also cuts hp/armor is self-limiting (the boss dies before its spiked swings matter). Saturated stress (every realm-5+ apex FORCED to carry one mod, 2500 runs each): offensive mods all EASIER than the 37.6% unmodded control (Skittering 47.1 / Volcanic 42.8 / Plagueridden 42.0), durability mods the only (mild) threat (Adamantine 31.7, Colossal 26.4); even the pathological all-Colossal-boss case holds 26.4% > 25% floor (real play = ~1.4% of bosses per mod). ENEMY-LEVER REALITY: hit is near-inert (base 0-1) and crit near-inert for enemies (additive to a 150 base on a 10% proc over base crit 1-3, < ~1% avg dmg); str/agi + hp are the load-bearing levers, armor the capped mitigation — crit/defense here are flavor. BALANCE: NEUTRAL, measured. Isolated A/B (baseline worktree off origin/main vs batch, 24k runs each) baseline 37.84% (9082/24000) vs batch 37.70% (9047/24000) = -0.15pt, z=-0.33 (dead neutral). Shipped `node scripts/selfplay.mjs --runs 6000 --check` 37.3% (2240/6000) IN-BAND [25,75], beatable+survivable, structural green (26,400 rooms: halls 400, frost 1600, blight 3600, ember 20800). JS-all 29.95KB brotli (<=55KB). Headless browser-verified: all 14 mods spawn with prepended names, a 'Colossal The Cinderwyrm' fights through lj.hero.fight + updateCharPane/battleLog with 0 console errors. GOTCHA for future mod/enemy runs: for the MOD pool DURABILITY (hp/armor) is the win-rate lever, not offense (an offensive mod that cuts hp/armor nets EASIER); crit/hit mults on enemies are ~inert — spend mod budget on str/agi/hp. Regenerate with: node scripts/selfplay.mjs --runs 6000 --check. PRIOR (new-boss-mechanic-5, 2026-07-16): added 'The Pyre Headsman' (red grade 'H'), the FIFTH apex boss mechanic — EXECUTE — and extended the apex rotation size%4 -> size%5 (T/W/S/M/H, all red, realms >=5). Execute is the deliberate MIRROR of the very first mechanic (enrage): enrage keys the boss's offense ramp to the BOSS's own dwindling HP (scarier as IT dies); execute keys the same ramp to the HERO's HP (scarier as the HERO dies). New helper lj.enemy.executes(enemy,currentHp,maxHp) returns a boosted attack snapshot (str+agi x damageMult, same shape as enraged, zero-alloc no-op on the common path) once the hero is below threshold*maxHp; js/combat.js chains it onto the boss's swing as executes(enraged(enemy,...),heroHealth,heroMaxHealth) — a boss carries one mechanic so the inapplicable helper is a strict no-op (the enrage snapshot lacks .mechanic, so execute passes it through). heroMaxHealth=100+heroStats.hp*5 (the game's real max formula). Like sunder it fires ONLY on the boss's own swing, so the hero still dies only on the boss's turn and the shared outcome.actor health-check needs no killing-blow special-case; it never adds boss HP nor eats hero blows, so fights stay SHORT — it just ends a losing fight faster, punishing the razor-thin boss-attrition near-miss (half of all boss deaths already land with the hero low). Wired: types.red.H, isBoss('H'), bossGradeForRealm size%5 default->H, hero.js creaturesAndItemsMap.H, scene.js spriteMap.H=[0,9] (reuses the boss sprite B/T/W/S/M already use — zero new render risk); realm.js places it via the existing generic bossGradeForRealm path, harness auto-fights bossGradeForRealm. A '.executed' log flag (parallel to '.enraged') is set for future telegraphs; nothing reads it yet. BALANCE — clean fifth SIBLING by the established method: reuses the Warden/Colossus/Reaver defensive block [5,7,82,1,3,5,2] EXACTLY (armor/defense untouched per the depth-philosophy; the mechanic carries the threat), with threshold + damageMult as the two knobs. A 5-combo isolated sweep (all deep = Headsman, 8k runs each) landed (threshold 0.55, damageMult 2.0) at 38.95%, confirmed at 12k = 38.88% — a dead-on PEER with the siblings (Cinderwyrm 38.9 / Warden 38.5 / Colossus 38.2 / Reaver 38.97; an all-Reaver control on this same post-affix-batch-4 codebase read 38.35). LOAD-BEARING: isolated OFF (mechanic disabled, plain block) 45.24% -> ON 38.88% = -6.36pt (~10 sigma), matching the siblings' 6-7pt swings. An easy first draft (0.35, 1.6) read 42.5% isolated (only -2.8pt, ~4pt too soft) — firing only below 35% HP barely bit because the hero was usually dead by then; widening to the bottom HALF of the bar (0.55) and doubling the boosted blows (2.0 = the kill move) made the back half genuinely lethal. SHIPPED (real size%5 rotation, deep runs meet every apex): isolated-tree 12k 36.65% / live-checkout 12k 37.43% (pooled ~37.0%) — NEUTRAL vs the pre-Headsman baseline 37.15% (clean origin/main, 10k), within noise. Shipped `node scripts/selfplay.mjs --runs 6000 --check` read 36.9% (2215/6000) IN-BAND [25,75], beatable+survivable, structural green (26,400 rooms: halls 400, frost 1600, blight 3600, ember 20800). JS-all 28.48KB brotli (<=55KB). Headless browser-verified on dist/: rotation 5-14 = T,W,S,M,H,T,W,S,M,H, isBoss('H'), an 'H' boss tile is placed+generated crash-free on a realm-5 board, 300 in-browser Headsman fights fire execute with 0 console errors. The realm-scaling exponent in lj.enemy.base (js/enemy.js) remains the primary GLOBAL difficulty lever. Regenerate with: node scripts/selfplay.mjs --runs 6000 --check
